sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, created_at DATETIME, status VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, created_at, status) VALUES (1, curutcdatetime(), 'active');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, created_at, status) VALUES (2, curutcdatetime(500000), 'inactive');
SELECT id, created_at, status FROM test_table WHERE status = 'active' AND created_at > curutcdatetime(1000000);
SELECT id, status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count FROM test_table GROUP BY status HAVING active_count > 0;
SELECT a.id, a.created_at, a.status FROM test_table a JOIN (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS latest_date FROM test_table) b ON a.created_at = b.latest_date;
SELECT id, status, curutcdatetime(1) AS adjusted_time FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL AND status IS NULL;
SELECT id, status FROM test_table WHERE created_at = curutcdatetime() OR (status IS NULL AND created_at < curutcdatetime(0));
SELECT id, status, bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE status = ''inactive''') AS inactive_count FROM test_table;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, bif:exec('SELECT curutcdatetime()') AS exec_time FROM test_table WHERE status = 'active';
